name: @strav/instant
description: Strav instant messaging — provider-agnostic abstraction for LINE / WhatsApp / Messenger. Normalized OutgoingMessage + capability-flagged drivers + webhook receiver. LINE ships as a subpath import (`@strav/instant/line`) with Flex builder, rich menus, beacons, and LIFF ID-token verification. WhatsApp + Messenger come in later releases.
